title: その名はキングヘイロー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As tryouts draw near, hopeful students are given a chance to
demonstrate their abilities to trainers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Deciding to observe the students' training progress, I head off to the
course, when an indignant voice catches my attention.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Gosh, I've already said this a million times!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I do have talent! I'm going to prove it at the tryouts and procure myself a first-rate trainer! If you don't believe me...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Then there's nothing more I have to say to you. Goodbye!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Geez, doesn't she know that I don't have time to talk on the phone right now—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Aaah! Wh-who are you? A stalker?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I quickly clear up the misunderstanding by introducing myself as a
new trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that so? Well then, excuse me. But consider yourself lucky that
you were able to catch me by surprise. It's a rare sight, so let's call it
even.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, what's with the face? Do you not understand how grateful you
should be right now?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me... Do you not know who I am?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
My goodness me, what a travesty! We mustn't waste any time—follow
me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She forcibly drags me along to the central square.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: All right everyone, assemble!

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Followers
text_block_list.text: Okaaay!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: What's happening, King?

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Who's this?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A new trainer. But for some reason, this person has no idea who I am!
Isn't that just absolutely tragic?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's why it's time for a proper introduction!

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Followers
text_block_list.text: You got it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's what I like to hear! Let's begin!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What's my name?

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Followers
text_block_list.text: King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What am I?

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: A winner!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: How's my future?

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Bright and beloved!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's right! For I am the one and only—

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: —King Halo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Hey, what's with that empty look on your face? Where's my
applause?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I just went out of my way to do a whole self-introduction for you! You
should be crying tears of joy while clapping!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Indeed it was. I'm sure the introduction has told you all that you need
to know—that the elegant, charming, and dignified King is a first-rate
racer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Surely now you understand the sheer magnificence, the intelligence,
and the expectations that I embody. And how it's only natural for the
entire school to be captivated by me?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What?! How could that possibly have flown over your head? You...
good-for-nothing!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Geez... Very well, once more from the top! Everyone, get in your
positions!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: But King, shouldn't you get going soon?

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, didn't you say you were going to be training with the others
today to prepare for the tryouts?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The training course is already filled with students going through their
practice routines. A large number of trainers have gathered to watch.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Ohohoho! I'm sure you were all dying to see me! Ohoho... Cough.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, if it isn't King. Did you sprint all the way here just to make
it in time? Take a little break and catch your breath, okay?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As if I need a break! There are more important things right now. Look
around you—all these trainers have gathered here to observe my
prowess!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Rest is for the weak! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well... You do you, I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hey, King! I'm glad you came too. I was about to start training. Do
you want to join?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Sky, come with us too. I'll give you the honor of eating my
dust!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Okay! Last one there bites the dust!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hey! No cheating!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What, are we starting already?! Wait for me!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Haha, well if it isn't the trickster Seiun Sky, the hard-working Special
Week, and the well-to-do King Halo.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
They certainly have their own quirks! I'm excited to see how those
three will perform in the tryouts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the sidelines, I watch as King Halo and the others race excitedly
against each other.
